mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TF_COMMENT( ID, POST_ID, AUTHOR_USER_ID, PARENT_COMMNET_ID, CONTENT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
) VALUES( #{id}, #{postId}, #{authorUserId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_COMMENT SET POST_ID = #{postId}, AUTHOR_USER_ID = #{authorUserId}, PARENT_COMMENT_ID = #{parentCommentId}, CONTENT = #{content}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
